chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Ist Civil Appeal No. S – 54 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1507/2023 (E/A) 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.1508/2023 (S/A) 15.12.2025 Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate for appellant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for the appellant, on instructions, required the bail appeal to be disposed of as not pressed. Ordered accordingly. Matter stands disposed of as not pressed along with listed applications. J U D G E Abdul Basit
